title: Micro XRCE-DDS Agent resource exhaustion via UDP flood
summary: The XRCE-DDS agent does not rate-limit incoming UDP CREATE_CLIENT messages, allowing an attacker to exhaust agent resources and cause a denial of service.

title: Zenoh router malformed frame parser crash
summary: A malformed Zenoh frame can trigger an out-of-bounds read in the router's message parser, leading to a crash.

name: DDS RTPS replay and session hijack
description: Captured RTPS messages can be replayed to manipulate DDS participant state due to weak sequence-number validation.
